import io

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    match string.parse_int(string.trim(s))
    when Some(n)
      if n >= 90
        print("A")
      else if n >= 75
        print("B")
      else if n >= 60
        print("C")
      else
        print("F")
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    match string.parse_int(string.trim(s))
    when Some(n)
      if n >= 90
        print("A")
      else if n >= 75
        print("B")
      else if n >= 60
        print("C")
      else
        print("F")
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
